body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Retarget child PRs before deleting parent branches**

This resume recipe says GitHub will retarget #64–#66 to `main` after the prior stacked base merges, but the same handoff records that deleting a stacked PR's base branch auto-closed #55 and that #49 had to be retargeted before deleting #48's branch. If the operator follows this step with the normal merge-and-delete flow for #63, the child PRs can be closed instead of becoming mergeable, forcing branch/PR recreation for the remaining stack.
